genuine.bundle_tree_contract: SHA-256 over ordered canonical JSON records {path,size,sha256} for pairs.csv and run_metadata.json, each followed by LF
genuine.label: plain_roll_genuine

negative.bundle_tree_contract: SHA-256 over ordered canonical JSON records {path,size,sha256} for pairs.csv and run_metadata.json, each followed by LF
negative.label: plain_roll_negative
negative.pairing_rule: next surviving subject within the same canonical finger position, circular shift by one

plain_self.label: plain_self

roll_self.bundle_tree_contract: SHA-256 over ordered canonical JSON records {path,size,sha256} for pairs.csv and run_metadata.json, each followed by LF
roll_self.label: roll_self
